projects.title: AI Crop Disease Prediction System
projects.description: An AI-powered web platform for instant crop disease prediction and tailored treatment advice.

projects.title: Simple Music Player
projects.description: Built a simple Music Player website using HTML, CSS and JavaScript with features like play, pause and track navigation. Focused on interactive UI and smooth user experience.

projects.title: Text-to-Speech News Reader
projects.description: An AI-powered web application that fetches live news headlines and converts text into natural voice output for accessible and hands-free news reading.
